title: 30 CRC in development
wikitext:
[]: 3.0 CRC in development!             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Jan 29, 2021 7:02 am As you can see, page numbers haven't been decided (P000~P000). But it is a thing! Shinji, Sakura and proto-DSS(?): tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) All things they shared (note: these tweets include the Groundworks books in some cases, aka keyframe collection, those were released years ago): EVA Mk.4 by Anno SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: 3.0 CRC in development!             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Fri Jan 29, 2021 7:16 am It's good to see, wee need a 3.0 CRC. For now, we have only the storyboards and the key frames . I would like to buy the hardcover edition, but is out of the stock. It seems they haven't reprinted since they published the more economical softcover edtion.

[]: Re: 3.0 CRC in development!             Quote Post by Zusuchan » Fri Jan 29, 2021 8:27 am This is exciting! It'll be cool to see what juicy nuggets of info will be there, though I doubt it'll be released before Shin.

[]: Re: 3.0 CRC in development!             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Jan 29, 2021 9:12 am I'll try updating the first post soon with all CRC stuff. But if someone gets ahead of me that's fine haha

[]: Re: 3.0 CRC in development!             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jan 29, 2021 10:26 am Exciting news! In that glimpse they share, I wonder if that giant thing on Shinji's cheek is an abandoned look for the DSS Choker. If it is I'm glad they didn't go with it.

[]: Re: 3.0 CRC in development!             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Jan 29, 2021 2:34 pm First post fully updated! Gendo'sPapa wrote: In that glimpse they share, I wonder if that giant thing on Shinji's cheek is an abandoned look for the DSS Choker. If it is I'm glad they didn't go with it.

[]: Re: 3.0 CRC in development!             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Jan 29, 2021 4:44 pm i wonder if we'll get some draft of what the version following the original trailer would have been like

[]: Re: 3.0 CRC in development!             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sat Jan 30, 2021 7:16 pm This is great. Not a lot of people know that 3.0 didn't get an "immediate" CRC release because the seekrit knowledge contained within was considered too spoilerific for 3.0+1.0.

[]: Re: 3.0 CRC in development!             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Jan 30, 2021 7:23 pm FelipeFritschF wrote: This is great. Not a lot of people know that 3.0 didn't get an "immediate" CRC release because the seekrit knowledge contained within was considered too spoilerific for 3.0+1.0.

[]: Re: 3.0 CRC in development!             Quote Post by Archer » Sun Jan 31, 2021 1:30 am FelipeFritschF wrote: This is great. Not a lot of people know that 3.0 didn't get an "immediate" CRC release because the seekrit knowledge contained within was considered too spoilerific for 3.0+1.0.

[]: Re: 3.0 CRC in development!             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Jan 31, 2021 2:07 pm kuribo-04 wrote: Wille logos by Anno SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: 3.0 CRC in development!             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Sun Jan 31, 2021 2:36 pm I realized this one isn't posted: Mari's drink bottle. I mean, she's drinking tea. tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: 3.0 CRC in development!             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Jan 31, 2021 3:01 pm JoelcrNeto wrote: I realized this one isn't posted: Mari's drink bottle. I mean, she's drinking tea.

[]: Re: 3.0 CRC in development!             Quote Post by Jinroh » Thu Feb 04, 2021 4:15 pm I've always wondered how she can even drink something while breathing LCL.

[]: Re: 3.0 CRC in development!             Quote Post by cyharding » Thu Feb 04, 2021 5:42 pm ^She likes the smell of it, so maybe she likes the taste of it too and doesn't mind taking a little with her tea.

[]: Re: 3.0 CRC in development!             Quote Post by Archer » Thu Feb 04, 2021 9:38 pm The liquidness of LCL while the Eva is active is somewhat in doubt, it's pretty much never depicted as if they're actually floating in liquid.

[]: Re: 3.0 CRC in development!             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Feb 04, 2021 9:47 pm 5284973 wrote: The liquidness of LCL while the Eva is active is somewhat in doubt, it's pretty much never depicted as if they're actually floating in liquid.

[]: Re: 3.0 CRC in development!             Quote Post by BusterMachine4 » Thu Feb 04, 2021 10:18 pm Well, there actually has been a lot of speculation about whether LCL actually turns into gas when an Eva is activated. I think there’s a lot of evidence that points to it being more than just “artistic license,” the main piece of evidence being the removal of the “liquid blur” effect when the Evas are active.

[]: Re: 3.0 CRC in development!             Quote Post by Jinroh » Sat Feb 06, 2021 3:14 am When Eva-13 impales itself Shinji spits bubbles, so he's clearly immersed in LCL. I think at that point it's just a bit inconsistent / incoherent.

[]: Re: 3.0 CRC in development!             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Fri Apr 02, 2021 8:46 am 3.0 CRC in development, confirmed! Shinji Ikari - rough draft by Yoshiyuki Sadamoto Shinji's patient gown reference by Yoshiyuki Sadamoto / bed sketch reference by Kazuya Tsurumaki. tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) Edit: changed "drawing" to "sketch", I got confused with the use of words in context.
